title: Mikel Merino's Late Winner Sinks Belgium!
hook: Spain strikes late to sink Belgium in the World Cup!
voiceover: Spain strikes late to sink Belgium in the World Cup! Fabián Ruiz opens the scoring in the 30th minute to put Spain up 1-0. Spain dominates possession with 68 percent, but Belgium fights back. In the 41st minute, Charles De Ketelaere levels the score at 1-1. Both teams battle hard, but in the 88th minute, Mikel Merino finds the decisive moment, scoring the late winner! Spain takes the 2-1 victory in dramatic fashion. Follow for more!
caption: Mikel Merino strikes in the 88th minute to secure a dramatic 2-1 World Cup win for Spain over Belgium!
